room.caption: [G3-5A] Welcome to the Courtyard of Cruel Curios. Our main attraction: Flying skulls having a crash on fairy girls.

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="You have to cut the rope." signSize=0

progUpdate=1350 idAttach=(174980) image_yscale=12 xAdjust=-11 yAdjust=(image_yscale-1)*4
if global.gameProgress>=1350 instance_destroy()
